entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary: In a discussion about the development of new features versus the implementation of inflationary measures, it was expressed that adding features that generate fees is generally preferred. This preference is highlighted by the consensus that such an approach would likely be less detrimental compared to options that might lead to inflation. The choice for developing fee-generating features over introducing inflationary tactics is seen as a more favorable strategy by most stakeholders involved in this dialogue. This perspective underscores a common attitude towards maintaining economic stability and user trust by avoiding inflation, while still seeking avenues for financial growth through additional features.
